_meta.purpose: Verified settlement-administrator-site facts for live settlements in the claim-path registry. Each record mirrors what the admin site itself publishes: claims URL, administrator, fund, class definition, important dates, claim-form requirement. Joined into liveSettlements by claim-paths-build.py via token + nameNeedles substring match.
_meta.verification: adminVerified=true means the facts were confirmed against the administrator site or multiple independent sources on verifiedOn date. Entries are date-sensitive: a claimDeadline in the past means the window is CLOSED regardless of what the catalogs say.

schema.tokens: canonical defendant tokens this record attaches to
schema.nameNeedles: lowercase substrings; record joins to a liveSettlements row when any needle appears in its name or defendant string
schema.claimFormRequired: true = a claim must be filed to get paid; false = payment/relief is automatic for the fixed class
schema.importantDates: ISO dates from the admin site; null = not set/unknown

_meta.sweep: 2026-06-11 full verification sweep: every live settlement searched as '<company> class action settlement administrator website'; deadline, fund, and claim requirements captured. adminVerified=false rows = official portal not located; confirm before outreach.
_meta.tcaSweep: 2026-06-11: full topclassactions.com open-settlements category (84 posts via WP REST API) diffed and merged; documentsUrl on TCA-sourced records points to the TCA article.

settlements.whatToProvide: No proof of purchase applicable

settlements.settlement: Anthem microprocessor-controlled prosthesis coverage class action settlement
settlements.classDefinition: The settlement benefits individuals covered by Anthem health insurance plans who were denied coverage for microprocessor-controlled knee or ankle prostheses as a result of Anthem’s Former Medical Policy on Microprocessor Controlled Lower Limb Prosthesis, Policy No. OR-PR.00003.
settlements.whatToProvide: Insurance information and other documentation that demonstrates that you incurred and paid out-of-pocket for a microprocessorcontrolled knee or foot-ankle prosthesis.
settlements.notes: Source: topclassactions.com full-category sweep 2026-06-11. Coverage-practice settlement (microprocessor prostheses); claims window not live; stale listing.

settlements.settlement: Sanyo solar panels delamination class action settlement
settlements.classDefinition: The settlement benefits consumers who purchased and installed Sanyo solar panels (model series HIP-xxxBA2, BA3 and BA5) for residential use or purchased a residential property with these solar panels installed on it.
settlements.notes: Source: topclassactions.com full-category sweep 2026-06-11. Long-tail window to 2029-12-31.

settlements.settlement: My Little Steamer class action settlement
settlements.classDefinition: Anyone who purchased a Joy/JM-branded My Little Steamer between Jan. 1, 2002, and Dec. 31, 2020.
settlements.notes: Source: topclassactions.com full-category sweep 2026-06-11. Recall settlement — rolling.

settlements.settlement: Whirlpool leaky refrigerator class action settlement
settlements.classDefinition: Consumers who purchased certain Whirlpool-manufactured refrigerators, acquired the refrigerators as part of a home purchase or remodel, or who received the refrigerators as a gift. A full list of eligible models is available on the settlement website. Models are split into two groups: Group A and Group B. This distinction is most important in the case of future freezing events.
settlements.whatToProvide: Documentation supporting repairs and associated costs.
settlements.notes: Source: topclassactions.com full-category sweep 2026-06-11.

settlements.settlement: Zonolite vermiculite attic insulation trust
settlements.classDefinition: If Zonolite attic insulation was installed in a structure that you currently own or rent, or that you previously owned or rented, and you incurred expenses associated with the removal, abatement, reinsulation or containing the insulation, you are eligible to submit a claim for reimbursement. The Trust applies to both residential and commercial buildings.
settlements.notes: Source: topclassactions.com full-category sweep 2026-06-11. Asbestos property trust — rolling claims, no deadline.
